style_effects: Subtle steam curls rise from Arbok's metallic joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished armor. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its seam lines, casting sharp geometric shadows. Metallic dust particles drift in slow motion, catching the cold blue-white light of its aura, which forms a tight, crystalline halo around its body. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
